englishDefinitions: (informal, transitive) To break or dent badly by hitting violently.
(informal, transitive) To injure (someone) with violent blows.
persianTranslation: (غیررسمی، گذرا) شکستن یا فرورفتگی بد با ضربه شدید.
(غیررسمی، متعدی) با ضربات شدید (کسی) را مجروح کردن.
examples: We got home to find that someone had bashed in the door.
Careful, or I'll bash your face in!
